name: Dessert Pizza
recipeIngredient: Assorted fresh fruit (select about three types such as apple, strawberries, banana, kiwi, blueberries, etc.) If using fruits that brown easily like apples or bananas, wait until ready to serve to cut and arrange the fruit on top of the pizza or sprinkle with fresh fruit.
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Press the sugar cookie dough into a 12-inch circle on a round baking stone or cookie sheet.
3. Bake for 10-15 minutes until golden brown. Allow to cool for ten minutes, then remove from the pan and let cool completely.
4. Spread the sugar and cream cheese mixture over the crust.
5. Arrange sliced fruit on top.
6. Chill before serving.
Yields 10 servings
